meta.title: The New Zealand writer Margaret Mahy
meta.sourceDoc: 91. P3 - The New Zealand writer Margaret Mahy 新西兰女作家.pdf
meta.matchedTitle: The New Zealand writer Margaret Mahy 新西兰女作家

passageNotes.label: Source
passageNotes.text: Explanations were extracted from the answer-analysis table in the source PDF by OCR. Minor OCR mistakes may remain; the official answer key is used for the answer field.

questionSections.text:
题目 27
答案：NO
PDF 定位："Mahy... has ventured into imaginative territory unknown to other local writers"
PDF 解析：NO 作者强调她走出传统、风格独特，因此与"传统 主题"相反

题目 28
答案：NOT GIVEN
PDF 定位：文中只说两类作品"standgloriouslyalone"， 未比较受欢迎程度
PDF 解析：NOT GIVEN 缺乏直接信息

题目 29
答案：NOT GIVEN
PDF 定位：仅称Knox是Mahy的"clearestheir"，没有 提到批评
PDF 解析：缺乏相关信息 NOT GIVEN

题目 30
答案：YES
PDF 定位："She is generous to a fault with her time and attention"
PDF 解析：YES 慷慨待访=欢迎采访者

题目 31
答案：NO
PDF 定位：..she isn't truly comfortable making herself or her life the heart of any conversation." 佐证句
PDF 解析：与"atease"相反 NO

题目 32
答案：B
PDF 定位："finding inspiration from her immediate environment ... writing on the side of a bus..
PDF 解析：灵感来自日常场景

题目 33
答案：E
PDF 定位："adventures on the high seas or in Antarctica, and also in quite unassuming places like the library...
PDF 解析：同时包含奇异与普通地点

题目 34
答案：I
PDF 定位："a young adult burdened with special powers, such as the ability to cast spells"
PDF 解析：主角常具魔法能力

题目 35
答案：H
PDF 定位："while the conclusions ... are usually predictable, they leave the reader feeling absolutely complete" 关键原句
PDF 解析：结尾可预见但令人满足 解析

题目 36
答案：B
PDF 定位："The story ballooned ... to 8oo pages and has been through at least two substantial rewrites. Now half its original size....
PDF 解析：说明写作过程中被大幅重构

题目 37
答案：C
PDF 定位："Bubble Trouble... first appeared in 1991... has been recited by Mahy at countless private and public functions... children and their parents know so well"
PDF 解析：体现"许多家庭的老少皆爱"

题目 38
答案：D
PDF 定位：第五段列举自己、继女、子女、孙辈都读Mahy的作品
PDF 解析：用家族例子说明作品跨世代受欢迎

题目 39
答案：C
PDF 定位："a book is not properly finished ... until it has been read, because a reader brings something important"
PDF 解析：读者被视为完成作品所必需

题目 40
答案：A
PDF 定位：末段引用David Hill故事→"His storywasa wonderful commentonMahy's vision"
PDF 解析：用幽默例子阐释Mahy的世界观
